case_title: VAN GALEN, PHILIP VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NEED MORE TIME TO REVIEW THE FILE.
MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BY JEREMY JOHNSTON, REPRESENTATIVE OF CITY & COUNTY OF SF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY VAN GALEN, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN GALEN, PHILIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE PROVISIONS OF CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 815.2 (B) AND CALIFORNIA PENAL CODE SECT. 847(B)(1) APPLY TO THE FACTS IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
